title: VillagerTradeFix
description: Solution for the villager trade abuse
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/YaPH9BI.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/VillagerTradeFix/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/VillagerTradeFix/issues)


VillagerTradeFix gives the Villagers the ability to remember their jobs with their specific offers. If the Villager looses his job and suddenly gets reemployed, he will sell the old items regardless of how many jobs he has worked in!

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
